subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 411362827 is not a GRB
body:
G. Fitzpatrick (UCD), reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst
Monitor Team:

The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 411362827 (140114.144) at
03:27:04.44 UT on 14th of January 2014, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a solar flare.
